summary: Phase 1 Asset Management enhancement testing completed. All 3 features verified: 1) Dynamic device-specific forms (22 device types supported with dynamic spec fields), 2) Bulk CSV upload with template downloads (10 template buttons), 3) Service history in expanded detail view. Backend API tests: 36/36 passed. Frontend UI tests: all flows working.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility best practice (pre-existing from iteration_9)

critical_code_review_comments: Dynamic form rendering via SpecFields component works correctly - type change clears specs and shows new fields
ASSET_TYPE_CONFIGS in assetTypeConfigs.js properly defines spec fields for all 22 device types
Bulk upload dialog shows template download buttons for 10 common device types
Backend /api/workspace/assets correctly stores and returns specs dict
Expanded asset detail view properly displays device-specific specs with type label
Service History section displays even when empty with appropriate message
All data-testid attributes properly placed for testing
seed_data_creation: Test CCTV camera asset created and deleted during testing (cleanup complete)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 Asset Management enhancement fully functional. All 22 device types have dynamic spec fields. Bulk upload supports CSV with device-specific columns. Service history displays in expanded view.

PHASE1_FEATURE_1_DYNAMIC_FORMS.description: Device-type-specific forms with dynamic spec fields

PHASE1_FEATURE_2_BULK_UPLOAD.description: Bulk CSV upload with downloadable templates

PHASE1_FEATURE_3_SERVICE_HISTORY.description: Service history in expanded asset detail view
